description: Wasm bailout-data use-after-free in JSJitFrameIter when Ion calls a Wasm function directly via FrameType::Exit. JSJitFrameIter held a BailoutInfo* pointing into stack memory tied to Wasm frames; after iterating past the Wasm frames the memory was reused, leaving the iterator pointing at freed bailout data. Follow-up to bug 1900523 (which only patched the JSJitToWasm trampoline path; the FrameType::Exit path used when Ion calls Wasm directly remained vulnerable). Fix (commit d5df70357db3d244669ed3147467e5b7ade0f51c by Jan de Mooij, 2024-06-19, r=iain) clears bailoutData_ before iterating Wasm frames on both boundary frame types. The in-tree regression test ships at js/src/jit-test/tests/ion/bug1902983.js.

fixes.description: Bug 1902983 - Don't use bailout data after iterating Wasm
